pages.text: The $(item)Large Aquatic Skyseed$() — clay and sand. A broad island around a proper deep lake.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A broad island cradling a $(bold)proper deep lake$() — a wide, deep pool rather than the small pond of the standard Aquatic isle.
$(bold)Life in deep water$()$(br)Squid and salmon swim the freshwater lake, and the depth is enough for $(item)glow squid$() to settle. Clay and gravel fill the body in quantity.

$(bold)Reefs and swamps$()$(br)Over an ocean the lake becomes a deep coral reef with tropical fish, cod and pufferfish — and the bed holds $(item)wet sponge$() to smelt dry (and, rarely, a whole $(o)Ocean Monument$() rises from it). Over a swamp, a lily-strewn pool with frogs.
